fileName: 2021年上海市中考英语试卷和答案.txt
questionText:
2021年上海市中考英语试卷整理稿（人工校准）

Part 2 Grammar and Vocabulary

II. Choose the best answer
21. Many medical workers are busy ______ their work during lunch time.
A. to
B. of
C. from
D. with

22. I haven't brought my dictionary with me. Can I use ______?
A. you
B. your
C. yours
D. yourself

23. There was ______ to eat at home, so I went out to get some food.
A. anything
B. nothing
C. something
D. everything

24. Yuan Longping is recognized as one of ______ agricultural scientists in the world.
A. great
B. greater
C. greatest
D. the greatest

25. Your idea of a day on the beach sounds ______. Can I join you?
A. lovely
B. softly
C. politely
D. beautifully

26. - The 10th China Flower Expo is being held in Chongming. ______ does it last?
- About 40 days.
A. How long
B. How soon
C. How far
D. How often

27. - ______ I have two tickets for the Chinese Farmers' Painting Exhibition?
- Sorry. The tickets are sold out.
A. Must
B. Need
C. Should
D. May

28. Last weekend, David ______ a visit to his grandparents in the countryside.
A. pays
B. paid
C. will pay
D. has paid

29. The headmaster is not available now. He ______ to the new teachers.
A. speaks
B. spoke
C. is speaking
D. was speaking

30. Michael and his friends practise ______ table tennis after school every day.
A. play
B. played
C. playing
D. to play

31. The manager asked his secretary ______ the report before Friday.
A. finish
B. finishes
C. finishing
D. to finish

32. We should look forward to the future, ______ never forget the past.
A. or
B. so
C. but
D. for

33. The fridge is environmentally friendly ______ it uses less electricity.
A. because
B. until
C. before
D. though

34. The amusement park has received many visitors, ______?
A. has it
B. hasn't it
C. does it
D. doesn't it

35. ______ amazing the film Hi, Mom is! Mother's love always touches my heart.
A. How an
B. How
C. What an
D. What

III. Choose the proper words in the box to complete the following passage
This section exists in the source text, but the current local extraction does not preserve a reliable word box plus answer mapping. It is kept out of structured JSON for now to avoid wrong import.

IV. Complete the sentences with the given words in their proper forms
44. I live near my school. It takes me only ten ______ to walk there. (minute)
45. Lily and Mary have known each other for ______ years. (seventh)
46. The Bund attracts many people with ______ beautiful night view. (it)
47. The organization has set strict rules on the release of ______ chemicals. (harm)
48. Without the glasses, he can't see the words on the blackboard ______. (clear)
49. Tony has made up his mind to be a soldier to ______ the country after graduation. (service)
50. Shanghai Museum has a large ______ of works of art from home and abroad. (collect)
51. Some rainforests are likely to ______ if we don't take action to protect them. (appear)

V. Complete the following sentences as required
52. My deskmate borrowed some books from the library at noon. (改为否定句)
My deskmate ______ ______ any books from the library at noon.

53. The government has spent 10 million yuan improving the water quality. (对划线部分提问)
______ ______ has the government spent improving the water quality?

54. Doctor Wu Mengchao saved a lot of patients' lives. (改为被动语态)
A lot of patients' lives ______ ______ by Doctor Wu Mengchao.

55. John is wondering how he can keep the balance between work and play. (改为简单句)
John is wondering ______ ______ keep the balance between work and play.

56. I had a good time in the ocean park the day before yesterday. (保持句意基本不变)
I ______ ______ in the ocean park the day before yesterday.

57. "Have you visited the National Book Expo?" Linda asked me. (改为间接引语)
Linda asked me ______ I ______ visited the National Book Expo.

58. a meal plan, the community, make, for the aged, is trying to (连词成句)
____________________________________________
answerText:
2021年上海市中考英语试卷答案整理稿（人工校准）

Part 2
II. 21-25 DCBDA 26-30 ADCBC 31-35 DCABB
III. Pending manual verification before structured import.
IV. 44 minutes 45 seven 46 its 47 harmful 48 clearly 49 serve 50 collection 51 disappear
V. 52 didn't, borrow 53 How much 54 were saved 55 how to 56 enjoyed myself / had fun / had a great time / had a nice time / had a wonderful time 57 whether/if, had 58 The community is trying to make a meal plan for the aged.

issues: 已人工校准导入 Part 2 的 II、IV、V。
Part 2 的 III 选词填空在当前本地文本中缺少可靠词盒映射，暂未并入结构化 JSON。
